title: Brain Homogenization and MSD Protocol for Mouse Brain and Serum

steps: Weight out brain using pre-chilled C-tube.
Use 2 mL RIPA (1x Halt PIC) per whole brain, 1 mL RIPA (1x Halt PIC) per half brain.
Homogenize brain using “protein_01_01” routine on Miltenyi gentle MACS Octodissociator.
Vortex briefly and incubate 00:30:00 On ice .
Centrifuge at 3500 rpm, 4 °C, 3 minutes .
Transfer homogenate to two 1.5 mL eppendorf tubes.
Vortex briefly and centrifuge at 14000 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes .
Transfer supernatant to new 1.5 mL eppendorf tubes
Perform 1:10 serial dilution.
Blot 2 µL diluted sample onto Direct Detect assay card (run duplicates).
Use 2 µL RIPA (1x Halt PIC) as blank.
Read assay card on Direct Detect Spectrometer.
Detectable range is 0.2 mg/mL to 5.0 mg/mL , dilute or concentrate as needed.
Average all readings for each sample to determine concentration.
Repeat homogenization routine if not fully homogenized.
Dilute using 10 µL sample to 90 µL RIPA (1x Halt PIC) to achieve 1:100 dilution. (1/2)
Dilute using 10 µL sample to 90 µL RIPA (1x Halt PIC) to achieve 1:100 dilution. (2/2)
Using concentration determined, calculate volume needed for 200 µg protein.
Use RIPA(1x PIC) to dilute 200 µg protein to 100 µL ( 2 µg/µL ).
Combine 100 µL sample and 100 µL MSD diluent in U-bottom plate.
Load 50 µL diluted sample to MSD plate per duplicate.
Proceed with MSD assay protocol from manufacturer.
Using concentration determined, calculate volume needed for 200 µg protein.
Use RIPA(1x PIC) to dilute 200 µg protein to 100 µL ( 2 µg/µL ).
Load 100 µL sample into U-bottom plate.
Add 20 µL 1 Molarity (M) HCl into U-bottom plate and shake for 00:10:00 at 25 °C .
Neutralize sample with 14 µL 1.2 Molarity (M) NaOH in 0.5 Molarity (M) HEPES.
Combine 100 µL treated sample and 100 µL MSD diluent in new U-bottom plate.
Load 50 µL diluted sample to MSD plate per duplicate.
Proceed with MSD assay protocol from manufacturer.
Add 25 µL MSD Diluent to MSD Plate per duplicate.
Add 25 µL serum sample to MSD Plate per duplicate.
Proceed with MSD assay protocol from manufacturer.
Add 37.5 µL MSD Diluent to MSD Plate per duplicate.
Add 12.5 µL serum sample to MSD Plate per duplicate.
Proceed with MSD assay protocol from manufacturer.
Add 50 µL serum sample to U-bottom plate.
Add 10 µL 1 Molarity (M) HCl into U-bottom plate and shake for 00:10:00 at 25 °C .
Neutralize sample with 7 µL 1.2 Molarity (M) NaOH in 0.5 Molarity (M) HEPES.
Add 25 µL MSD Diluent to MSD Plate per duplicate.
Add 25 µL treated serum sample to MSD Plate per duplicate.
Proceed with MSD assay protocol from manufacturer.
creator: Jane Balster
